localized title: Bad Times at the El Royale
plot outline: Six strangers, (Jeff Bridges, Cynthia Erivo, Dakota Johnson, Jon Hamm, Cailee Spaeny and Lewis Pullman) each with their own secrets, meet at the El Royale hotel of Lake Tahoe. Taking place over one night, alliances are made and secrets are revealed.
title: Bad Times at the El Royale
original title: Bad Times at the El Royale
akas: Sale temps à l'hôtel El Royale (France)
ホテル・エルロワイヤル (Japan, Japanese title)
